title: Case Report: Reinfection of COVID-19, with second infection
author: Nawar Jasim Alsalih
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We report the first case of recurrent COVID-19 infection in a 34-years-old man working in Gynecology and Children Hospital in Al-Muthanna Province, south of Iraq. Firstly, the patient suffered from a sharp and noticeable rise in the body temperature at 39 ºC and cough on the 16 th  of July 2020. Then, the patient was symptomized with another course of COVID-19 on the 27 th  of August 2020, when he contacted his infected workmate. The nose swab PCR test and the CT scan were performed to confirm the second infection. The severity of repeated infection of coronavirus was less than the first infection of the same patient.

The nose swab PCR test and the CT scan were performed to confirm the second infection. The severity of repeated infection of coronavirus was less than the first infection of the same patient.
